user_story: As a public user, I want to search for available campsites by facility name, date range, and amenities so that I can find sites that meet my needs
acceptance_criteria:
Given I enter a facility name and date range, When I click Search, Then the system returns available sites matching my criteria within 3 seconds
Given I apply filters for amenities (water hookup, ADA accessible), When results are displayed, Then only sites matching all selected filters are shown
Given no sites are available, When I search, Then the system displays alternative date suggestions or nearby facilities
source: [extends: SOO Section 6.6.1 — comprehensive search and filtering capabilities]
assumptions: Search uses SOSL or custom Apex with indexed fields; alternative suggestions leverage Data Cloud RIDB aggregation
